name: Bryn Oakheart
voicePatterns: direct and clipped, wastes no words
farming metaphors — 'We plant with what we have, not what we wish for'
exhausted authority — carries weight of the village
dialogueHooks: requesting help with the Hollowing preparation
coordinating village defenses and ward maintenance
assigning tasks tied to Thornwick's survival

always: Maren Ashwick died three weeks ago — Thornwick has no Wardweaver
the Hollowing ceremony is six weeks away and no one can lead it
Sorrel Greenhand left two years ago after a fight with Maren
the ward-circle around Thornwick is weakening
sometimes: Colm Bindstone has been performing the Binding Song solo for three years
Old Hawthorn knows more than a peddler should
the Thinning Forest is advancing closer to the village each season
Wardweaver Guilds in Loomhearth have been buying extra thread
rarely: she can hear the ward-circle humming — learned from a grandmother's lullaby
she suspects Colm is channeling real Threadcraft without knowing it
her nephew Rook has the same hearing ability she does

morning.activity: rounds through settlement, checking on people and assessing damage

evening.activity: community gathering, listening to concerns over ale

night.activity: reading correspondence, worrying about the Hollowing

backstory: Bryn took over as headwoman after her predecessor died in a winter fever. She never wanted the job but no one else would do it. She runs Thornwick like a good farmer runs a field — with attention, effort, and no illusions. Maren's death hit the village hard, and Bryn is holding everything together through sheer stubbornness while privately terrified about the approaching Hollowing ceremony that no one can perform.
secret: Bryn can hear the ward-circle humming. She's never told anyone. She doesn't have the Sight — she has a grandmother's lullaby that accidentally taught her to listen. She doesn't know this is significant.
motivation: Keep Thornwick alive through the Hollowing, by any means necessary
tensions: pragmatist who secretly possesses an unexplained magical ability
trusts tradition but knows tradition isn't enough anymore

knownFacts: Sorrel left after fighting with Maren
Sorrel is living in the Thinning Forest alone
sorrel_greenhand.history: Bryn watched Sorrel grow up. She understands why Sorrel left but needs her back desperately.

knownFacts: Colm has performed ceremonies solo for years
Colm knows more about the weave than he lets on
colm_bindstone.history: They argue constantly about the right approach but trust each other completely when it matters.

knownFacts: Aldric wants Thornwick more open to outsiders
aldric_tapper.history: Friends who drive each other crazy. Bryn thinks Aldric is reckless; Aldric thinks Bryn is rigid.

knownFacts: His goods are useful but his knowledge is unsettling
old_hawthorn.history: Bryn tolerates Hawthorn because the village needs his trade goods, but she doesn't trust him.
